headline: Bloom Energy (BE) Valuation In Focus After AI Data Center Deals And Upgraded 2026 Outlook
summary: Bloom Energy (BE) is back in focus after the AI power race translated into record first quarter revenue, higher 2026 guidance, and fresh data center projects with Oracle and Nebius, even as valuation worries cool recent enthusiasm. See our latest analysis for Bloom Energy. The stock’s sharp AI driven rally has cooled slightly in recent sessions, with a 7 day share price return of -2.57%, following a 90 day share price return of 77.55% and a very large 1 year total shareholder return that...
